changes: Update the drag and resistance model to be more explicit and more customizable per vehicle.
Fixed a bug with deceleration when clutch is helled. The vehicle wouldn't apply wheel losses.
Fixed a bug with the engine where if you hold the clutch and the vehicle is coasting it would try to constantly start after you turn it off.
serverChanges: Reworked server updater to actually work for Linux and Mac. Previously it was trying to use a Windows executable for all platforms, which was a major bug.
Upgraded the server to net-10.0 to align with the modern client for all platforms other than Windows. This has very little effect for the normal user.
